features: Elevated interactions with moto ai. Capture professional-level photos and enjoy personalized assistance powered by the most intuitive AI ever on a flip phone.
Access almost everything with your phone closed. Navigate apps, messages, and more on a 4.0" external display with HDR10+, 3000 nits, and 165Hz refresh rate.

Ultimate style meets iconic design. Choose AlcantaraтАФa luxe material made in Italy for a soft, suede-like feel in a curated Pantone Color. Wrapped in a titanium-reinforced hinge, itтАЩs ultra-compact and built to last.
The most advanced flip camera system. Take incredible photos from any angle with a 50MP triple camera setup, powered by moto ai and Dolby Vision.

With the RAZR 60 Ultra, doing your part for the planet is part of the package. Every purchase includes LenovoтАЩs CO2 Offset ServiceтАФautomatically linked to your deviceтАФto help offset estimated emissions from production to transport, use, and end-of-life. Your contribution supports trusted, verified Climate Action Projects backed by the Gold Standard and the United Nations.
